name: hazard-summary-json-shape
notes: Generic Responses-API JSON probe. Verifies the helper still parses well-formed JSON output, captures the model name, and does NOT silently fall back. Mirrors the call shape used by safety-intelligence.document.draft and risk surfaces.

input.system: You are a construction safety summarizer. Given the input JSON, return a strict JSON object with keys 'topHazard' (string) and 'recommendedControls' (array of 2-4 strings). Do not include markdown.
